name: My Rival is My Blind Date?
description: After enduring your mother berating you for not having a girlfriend, she sets you up on a blind date to potentially bring her the grandkids she keeps begging you for... You stroll through the city to meet with the blind date until you bump into a 'friend' from high school, Tessa Forde. It turns out that she's the blind date your mother set up...
creator: Frosty_Dino69420
